nasb.text: And all the people were trying to touch Him, for power was coming from Him and healing them all.

esv.text: And all the crowd sought to touch him, for power came out from him and healed them all.

cnv.text: 群眾都設法摸他，因為有能 力從他身上出來，治好眾人。

ccb.text: 大家都想去摸祂，因为有能力从祂身上发出来，可以治好人们的疾病。

csbs.text: 众人都想要摸到他，因为有能力从他身上发出，使所有的人得痊愈。
